prompt: A chef in a black chef's jacket with visible buttons and blue jeans is chopping Bok Choy on a round wooden cutting board. The camera captures this action from a high angle, framing a medium shot with slight random camera motion. The chef, positioned on the left side of the frame, makes an open-handed gesture with their left hand before beginning to slice the Bok Choy with a cleaver held in their right hand. The chef's left hand moves away from the vegetable, revealing a black watch on their wrist. As the cleaver descends, the chef saws downward, slicing through the Bok Choy. The setting is a well-lit kitchen area, with various bowls containing ingredients scattered around. One bowl emits steam, and another is filled with ramen. In the background, a stainless steel pot with a rounded lid sits on the stove, and a brown-colored object is centered behind it. To the left, an opening leads to a brighter area.
